title: Fixing the Navbar Level Display Bug
summary: We've identified and are addressing a bug where the level display in the navbar isn't updating correctly. Your progress visibility is important to us!
core_message: We are actively working on resolving an issue where the user's level display in the navigation bar is not accurately reflecting their current level. This fix is a priority to ensure accurate user profile information is always visible.
cta: Check your profile for the latest updates!
visual_brief: A screenshot of the CodeGrind navbar with a subtle visual indicator highlighting the incorrect level display, possibly with a 'bug fix in progress' overlay.

media.selection_reason: No public blob assets were available, so the workflow will generate a review image from the brief.
